statement: Expectation is m_k+O_k(n^{-1}); normalized variance is O_k(n^{-2}).
No theorem for Kim--Tao random hyperbolic covers is proved.
No Selberg trace variance or quotient-family estimate follows from this free-Schreier result.
No adjacency-to-Laplacian transfer theorem is proved.
No shrinking-window local spectral statistics result is proved.
Surface-group quotient-family coefficient variation remains a separate open target.
